programme.title: Balance of Power
programme.desc: Balance of Power Focusing on politics and policies on Capitol Hill, in President Trump's administration, the federal agencies and the courts.

programme.title: Bloomberg Businessweek
programme.desc: Bloomberg Businessweek Carol Massar and Tim Stenovec bring together the latest news from the worlds of business and finance and the interesting stories of global technology, politics, economics and more.

programme.title: Are Bots Killing Online Poker?
programme.desc: Are Bots Killing Online Poker? Computers have outplayed humans in chess and Go for decades. But poker was long considered unhackable-until bots from Russia and elsewhere got in the game.

programme.title: The Circuit With Emily Chang
programme.desc: The Circuit With Emily Chang Emily Chang meets California's First Couple, Governor Gavin Newsom and Jennifer Siebel Newsom, visiting their home in Marin County and offices in Sacramento to see how they work together.

programme.title: The Circuit
programme.desc: The Circuit Emily Chang speaks with Microsoft titans Bill Gates, Steve Ballmer and Satya Nadella about the company's journey from scrappy startup to global powerhouse.

programme.title: The Circuit
programme.desc: The Circuit Emily Chang speaks with Microsoft titans Bill Gates, Steve Ballmer and Satya Nadella about the company's journey from scrappy startup to global powerhouse.

programme.title: The Circuit With Emily Chang
programme.desc: The Circuit With Emily Chang Emily Chang meets Snap CEO Evan Spiegel in Los Angeles for a conversation about his entrepreneurial journey, building Snap and his consumer hardware bet.
